title: bouteloua eriostachya
intro: Bouteloua eriostachya, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Blue Grama Grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
